title: Toolkit for educators: Activities for ages 9 to 11 - Canada.ca
content:
Canada's food guide kids

## Toolkit for educators: Activities for ages 9 to 11
These activities are intended for children aged 9 to 11 years old. They will help them learn:
- to identify different cooking methods
- about foods that are part of different cultures and traditions
- to practice eating thoughtfully and making eating enjoyable
These activities support children in experiencing and exploring foods which are part of Canada's food guide.
Take time to eat and enjoy
Additional learning activities
- Toolkit for educators
For recipes and more food guide resources visit: Canada.ca/FoodGuide
